rules.rule: cluster_id required and unique within fusion-clusters/
member_fingerprint_ids must be non-empty list of resolvable fingerprint_ids
cluster_fingerprint MUST be deterministic SHA-256 over sorted member fingerprints
all members MUST share structural_kind (no cross-kind clustering)
cluster preserves union of evidence_refs and grounding_refs from members
fusion is reviewer-governed; no autonomous clustering
cluster_state begins 'pending-review' and may only be promoted via canonical-entity-promote or canonical-procedure-converge
